name: io.github.cyanheads/obsidian-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Obsidian vaults — read, write, search, and edit notes via the Local REST API plugin.

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the Obsidian Local REST API plugin (Settings → Community Plugins → Local REST API).

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Obsidian Local REST API. Default: http://127.0.0.1:27123 (enable "Non-encrypted (HTTP) Server" in plugin settings). Use https://127.0.0.1:27124 for the always-on HTTPS port (self-signed cert; pair with OBSIDIAN_VERIFY_SSL=false).

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_VERIFY_SSL
environmentVariables.description: Whether to verify the TLS certificate on the Obsidian endpoint. Default false because the plugin uses a self-signed cert.

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_ENABLE_COMMANDS
environmentVariables.description: Opt-in flag for the command-palette pair (obsidian_list_commands + obsidian_execute_command). Off by default — Obsidian commands are opaque and can be destructive.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
